# realistic-speech-gaps.mp4

Fixture clip derived from `Universe (1976).webm`.

- Source: https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Universe_(1976).webm
- Source title: `Universe (1976).webm`
- Author: National Aeronautics and Space Administration
- Date: 1976
- Source license/status: Public domain in the United States; NASA work
- Fixture section: 00:01:00 through 00:02:30 of the source file
- Fixture processing: transcoded to H.264/AAC MP4 for test portability

Wikimedia Commons lists the source file as public domain because it was solely
created by NASA. NASA usage restrictions around logos, insignia, emblems, and
endorsement still apply.
